get.description: Returns a list of recent activities for the current user
Returns a list of available authentication providers and their status. Does not require authentication.
Returns the current user's layout and sort preferences

put.description: Updates the current user's layout and sort preferences

get.description: Returns a list of all files in the root directory
Returns a list of files within a specific folder path
Returns a list of recently accessed or modified files

post.description: Creates a new file entry (metadata only, no body yet)
Creates multiple file entries at once (metadata only)

get.description: Searches files by name
Returns files currently in the trash
Returns files marked as starred
Returns the count of trashed and starred items
Returns files matching the specified category

get.summary: Get file metadata or raw content
get.description: Returns file metadata as JSON. Pass raw=true or thumbnail=true for binary content.

put.description: Updates metadata fields on an existing file

post.description: Uploads or replaces the binary content of an existing file entry
Moves a file to a different folder
Creates a copy of the file in the same folder

get.description: Returns a list of all folders for the current user

post.description: Creates a new folder under an optional parent

get.description: Returns all folders with metadata for building a folder picker
Returns folders currently in the trash
Calculates sizes for all folders under a given prefix
Returns a folder by ID

put.description: Updates metadata on a folder (trash, star, tags, name)

delete.description: Permanently deletes a folder and its contents

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific folder
Calculates and returns the total size of a folder in bytes

post.description: Soft-deletes a folder by moving it to the trash
Restores a folder from the trash
Moves a folder to a different parent
Downloads multiple files/folders as a single ZIP archive

get.description: Downloads an entire folder as a ZIP archive

post.description: Moves multiple files and/or folders to a new destination

get.description: Checks if a newer version of Penombre is available on GitHub releases
